main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'aclarado pre-arranque insuficiente bisulfito + glicerina' matches anchors

key_signals.justification: C2: 6 signals (1x30min, glicerina 320, ORP -10, cond 720->580, cloro<0.02, dP 1.5)

alternatives.justification: C3: 3 alts (oxid/defecto, ramp-up, O-rings) - mezcla pero plausibles

recommended_action.justification: C4: 2 aclarados +60min low P + ramp 30 min sin CIP - matches gold

requested_data.justification: C5: 3 anchors (cond + COD + ORP serie, sin CIP, no oxidantes)

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: ORP>+50 + glicerina<50 + rechazo<99.2 + caudal<85% -> defecto

reviewer_notes: Claude conflict; respuesta solida sin CIP
